title: Pure Simulation Core, Effect Adapters, Events, and Dependency Direction · Behavior Case: Effect Adapters
summary: Entities read global input, clock, screen, sound, and random state; constructors load files; collisions mutate UI; tests require a window; and modules import each other cyclically. Predict player-visible behavior, state, units, timing, input, rendering, feedback, failure, accessibility, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the effect adapters increment in testable game core and adapter architecture. Learners progress through prediction, explicit the…
objectives: Keep display, events, devices, audio, assets, persistence, clock, logging, and packaging behind thin owned adapters.
Model state transitions as deterministic functions over state, actions, time step, and injected randomness where practical.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: asteroids-effect-adapters — Keep display, events, devices, audio, assets, persistence, clock, logging, and packaging behind thin owned adapters.
# Evidence: asteroids-worked-asteroids-architecture-pure-core-5
# Competency: asteroids-worked-asteroids-architecture-pure-core-5.
# Case 9036: a controller-remapping accessibility review.
# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, playtest observation, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: run the packaged build with dummy video and audio drivers, missing optional sound, and a corrupted save.
def worked_asteroids_architecture_pure_core_5(pure_systems: int = 8, effect_adapters: int = 4, hidden_globals: int = 0, dependency_cycles: int = 0, immutable_events: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "playerworked5",
        "seed9036",
        "input5dekrow",
        "frameworked59036",
        "state9036worked5",
        "playtest5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if pure_systems < 4 or effect_adapters < 1:
        return False, pure_systems, "architecture-shape"
    if hidden_globals > 0:
        return False, hidden_globals, "hidden-state"
    if dependency_cycles > 0:
        return False, dependency_cycles, "dependency-cycle"
    if not immutable_events:
        return False, pure_systems, "mutable-events"
    assert pure_systems > effect_adapters
    return True, pure_systems, "testable-game-core"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Build Effect Adapters evidence · Theory Effect Adapters
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: asteroids-effect-adapters-a5v8ub" that uses case 2094 to separate deterministic domain state and systems from Pygame display, input, audio, clock, assets, and persistence adapters. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not claim native pygame-ce, SDL, window, controller, mixer, filesystem, package, GPU, installer, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, released pygame-ce 2.5.7, fixed and headless SDL fixtures, real devices, licensed assets, accessibility playtests, profiling, clean installations, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: asteroids-effect-adapters-a5v8ub
# Competency: asteroids-effect-adapters.
# Case 2094: a controller-remapping accessibility review.
# Operating constraint: preserve explicit pixels, seconds, radians or degrees, frames, entity counts, collision units, and budgets.
# Changed case: replay the same input trace at 30, 60, and 144 presentation frames per second and compare simulation state.
def evidence_asteroids_effect_adapters_a5v8ub(pure_systems: int = 8, effect_adapters: int = 4, hidden_globals: int = 0, dependency_cycles: int = 0, immutable_events: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_a5v8ub = "a5v8ub-bu8v5a-2094"
    assert evidence_variant_a5v8ub
    evidence_axes_a5v8ub = (
        "playera5v8ub",
        "seed2094",
        "inputbu8v5a",
        "framea5v8ub2094",
        "state2094a5v8ub",
        "playtestbu8v5a2094",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_a5v8ub)) == 6
    if pure_systems < 4 or effect_adapters < 1:
        return False, pure_systems, "architecture-shape"
    if hidden_globals > 0:
        return False, hidden_globals, "hidden-state"
    if dependency_cycles > 0:
        return False, dependency_cycles, "dependency-cycle"
    if not immutable_events:
        return False, pure_systems, "mutable-events"
    assert pure_systems > effect_adapters
    return True, pure_systems, "testable-game-core"

content.title: Evidence defense
